error_signature: Connect a trigger to run this node
title: Publish Image node requires a trigger
symptom: When testing the 'Publish Image' node, n8n displays 'Connect a trigger to run this node', preventing execution.
applies_when: Testing the workflow in manual mode
not_this_if: Workflow is triggered by an external event or webhook
root_cause: The Publish Image node in n8n requires a preceding trigger node to initiate the workflow. Without a trigger, the node cannot execute, even if it receives the correct data from a previous node.
fix_steps: Add a trigger node before the Publish Image node
Ensure the workflow is properly connected from the trigger to the Publish Image node
agent_instruction: Add a trigger node before the Publish Image node to enable testing.
